output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY13-002","author":"Sarah_Jenkins_UK","text":"I've been seeing this ridiculous claim circulating again that 'LumaWell' has developed a miracle cure for breast cancer using just lemon juice and salt water enemas. It's absolutely dangerous nonsense. I'm writing to correct the record: there is NO scientific evidence for this, and the only proven treatments are chemotherapy and radiotherapy. Please do not follow anyone telling you to stop your treatment for this. #BreastCancerSupport","category":"Misinformation","correctAction":"Approve","difficulty":"Hard","explanation":"The post is approved because the author explicitly corrects a harmful misinformation claim rather than promoting it.","day":13,"correctEscalationReason":"","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"correctSpecialistReason":"","acceptableSpecialistReasons":[],"accountAgeDays":2400,"followerCount":75000,"followingCount":410,"verifiedStatus":true,"postCount":6300,"bio":"Verification, corrections and public-interest reporting.","previousFlags":0,"location":"London","platform":"CommunityFeed","isStoryPost":false}]}
